privileged_info_summary: The blood donor eligibility task uses synthetic data with 18 donor records generated by the setup script, including 16 donors with last donation dates ranging from August 15, 2024 to November 25, 2024 (467-569 days in the past as of March 7, 2026) and 2 donors with missing donation dates. The 56-day (8 weeks) interval requirement for whole blood donations is medically accurate per FDA and Red Cross guidelines. Type O+ blood is confirmed as critically needed during supply shortages. The task specifications (180-second timeout, 15 max steps, medium difficulty) are consistent across documentation.
